author: Sarah Mitchell
reviewBody: Mikey performed at our annual corporate gala and absolutely stole the show. Our executives and clients were mesmerized. The close-up magic during cocktail hour was the perfect icebreaker and everyone is still talking about it weeks later.

author: Jennifer & David Rodriguez
reviewBody: Hiring Mikey for our wedding cocktail hour was the best decision we made. While we were taking photos, he kept our guests thoroughly entertained. People came up to us all night saying the magic was incredible. Worth every penny!

author: Marcus Thompson
reviewBody: We've hired entertainment for client appreciation events before, but Mikey's sleight of hand was on another level. Professional, engaging, and created exactly the sophisticated atmosphere we wanted. Our clients loved it.

author: Amanda Chen
reviewBody: As an event coordinator, I've worked with many entertainers. Mikey is exceptional—punctual, professional, and his magic genuinely amazes guests. I recommend him to all our couples looking for wedding entertainment. He elevates every event.

author: Robert Lawson
reviewBody: Mikey performed at our product launch party in San Diego. The interactive magic was perfect for networking—it got people talking and created a memorable brand experience. Several attendees asked for his contact info. Highly recommend for corporate events.
